text:
is a conceptual Angel which was never used in any work, only appearing in Neon Genesis Evangelion Proposal documents.

Profile

It is designed as a floating white "monolith" with an appearance like a face crowned by four spikes and wearing a very tall, steep miter adorned with a blue gem. It is described as extremely powerful, seems impervious to all attacks, and steadfastly seeks out its targets with the aim of self-destruction.

Trivia

Given its combat style involving seeking out enemies and self destructing, it's possible Turel was used as inspiration for Sahaquiel, being another aerial Angel whose ultimate goal involved its own demise.
